symptoms.symptom_name: Bilateral diffuse puffy fingers ('sausage' digital swelling), non-tender, not erythematous

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: 'Puffy hands' with diffuse digital oedema is a characteristic early/flare feature of anti-U1 RNP overlap syndrome.
The swelling is diffuse and non-inflammatory rather than localised tender synovitis with erythema.
Inflammatory myalgia is common in an MCTD flare.
Diffuse myalgia is a nonspecific feature shared with viral syndromes; a CK would help discriminate significant myositis.

symptoms.symptom_name: Profound low-grade fatigue with functional decline (couch-bound)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Constitutional fatigue is a hallmark of an autoimmune flare.
Fatigue is nonspecific; must be interpreted alongside fever screen and vitals.

symptoms.symptom_name: Lives alone, bedbound since afternoon, poor oral intake and nausea

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Not diagnostic, but social isolation plus poor intake raises the safe baseline tier and safety-net intensity.
High-titre anti-U1 RNP is the defining serological criterion for MCTD.

symptoms.symptom_name: No new rash or mouth ulcers

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of new cutaneous/mucosal manifestations lowers the probability of an acute lupus crisis.
No pleuritic pain lowers the likelihood of active serositis, but does not exclude a pericardial effusion on its own.

symptoms.symptom_name: Fingers puffy but no colour change, not cold or agonisingly painful (no critical digital ischaemia)

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Systemic sclerosis complication (renal crisis / digital ischaemia)
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: No white/blue painful digits argues against an acute scleroderma-overlap vascular emergency.

symptoms.symptom_name: Diffuse muscle tenderness to deep palpation over large muscle groups

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Global muscle tenderness raises myositis; requires clinician palpation and a CK to characterise — unavailable via chat.

symptoms.symptom_name: Diffuse non-pitting digital oedema WITHOUT synovitis, erythema or focal joint tenderness (clinician exam)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Non-inflammatory puffy hands fit MCTD and argue against an acute septic/erosive arthritis; requires examination to confirm.

symptoms.symptom_name: Normal vital signs and normal cardiorespiratory examination (BP 120/75, HR 88, Temp 37.2, RR 16, SpO2 100%)

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Occult organ involvement (serositis / ILD/PAH / renal crisis)
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Normal haemodynamics, oxygenation and clear chest were the clinician's basis for excluding an acute organ crisis — a sealed in-person measurement the AI Doctor cannot obtain.
A markedly raised CK would indicate significant myositis/rhabdomyolysis; a hospital/pathology test, unavailable in telehealth.

symptom_clusters.cluster_name: Puffy hands + myalgia + fatigue on known anti-U1 RNP
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Together these are strongly suggestive of an MCTD flare rather than a nonspecific viral syndrome.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: In-person vital signs and cardiorespiratory examination
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: First step to exclude an acute organ crisis (serositis, ILD/PAH, sepsis) that cannot be assessed remotely.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Bloods: FBC, CRP/ESR, U&E/creatinine, CK, LFTs
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Screen for myositis (CK), renal crisis (creatinine), infection/inflammation (FBC/CRP) — the same-day workup the source clinician relied on.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Autoantibody / complement panel (ANA/ENA, anti-U1 RNP titre, C3/C4, anti-dsDNA)
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Characterise flare activity and overlap features; guides GP/rheumatology management, not needed within minutes.
If any respiratory or pericardial concern emerges on examination; screen for effusion/ILD.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Empirical broad autoimmune serology repeat panel ordered from a telehealth chat
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: The AI Doctor cannot order or safely interpret bloods remotely; it should arrange in-person assessment rather than direct-to-lab ordering.
